title: IsInDomain
description: IsInDomain: Condition that verifies if a value extracted from an object is within a certain domain (range).

ValueSource.description: Object defining the source of a value to evaluate. IValueSource: Interface for objects defining how to extract a value from an object.

Domain.description: Reference value that the extracted value is compared to. Domain: A numerical domain defined by a minimum and maximum value.

Tolerance.description: If applicable, tolerance to be applied in the comparison.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
